title: trifolium patens
intro: Trifolium patens, also known as the white clover, is a perennial legume that belongs to the pea family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and gastrointestinal problems. The health benefits of Trifolium patens include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve digestion. Trifolium patens can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used as a food source for livestock and as a natural fertilizer.
